ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the make of the vehicle */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model of the vehicle */,
  "produce_year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was produced */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fuel type of the vehicle */,
  "gear_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gear type of the vehicle */,
  "engine_power" INTEGER /* Engine power of the vehicle */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance traveled by the vehicle */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the vehicle (e.g., private, public) */,
  "ad_data_push" TEXT /* Date the vehicle's advertisement data was last updated */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle body (e.g., Sedan, SUV) */,
  "interior_color" TEXT /* Interior color of the vehicle */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Detailed transmission type (e.g., 6-speed manual, 8-speed automatic) */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Drive type (e.g., FWD, RWD, AWD) */,
  "num_doors" INTEGER /* Number of doors */,
  "num_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats */,
  "engine_capacity" REAL /* Engine capacity in liters */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency in miles per gallon (MPG) */,
  "emissions_standard" TEXT /* Emissions standard (e.g., Euro 6, EPA Tier 3) */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Warranty expiration date */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service */,
  "service_history" TEXT /* Service history details */,
  "features" TEXT /* Additional features of the vehicle (e.g., sunroof, GPS, leather seats) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., available, sold, reserved) */,
  "images" TEXT /* URLs or paths to vehicle images */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_gear_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("gear_type_id") REFERENCES gear_types ("gear_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_make_id FOREIGN KEY ("make_id") REFERENCES makes ("make_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "makes" (
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle make */,
  "make_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle make (e.g., Fiat, Kia) */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the make is headquartered */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Official website URL of the make */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the logo of the make */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model (e.g., Panda, Cerato) */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle make */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the model was first introduced */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle body (e.g., Sedan, SUV) */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., V6, I4) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Primary fuel type (e.g., Petrol, Diesel) */,
  "gear_type" TEXT /* Primary gear type (e.g., Manual, Automatic) */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Primary drive type (e.g., FWD, RWD, AWD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., Petrol, Diesel) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the fuel type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gear_types" (
  "gear_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gear type */,
  "gear_type" TEXT /* Type of gear (e.g., Manuel, Automatic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the gear type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gear_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was sold */,
  "sale_price" INTEGER /* Price the vehicle was sold for */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who made the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who bought the vehicle */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated invoice */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  "customer_satisfaction" INTEGER /* Customer satisfaction rating (1-5) */,
  "sale_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., salesperson, manager) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary of the employee */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for sales (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_history" (
  "sale_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales history entry */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sale */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who made the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who bought the vehicle */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was made */,
  "sale_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the sales history entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_history_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sale */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "total_amount" INTEGER /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the invoice */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, overdue) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made (if applicable) */,
  "payment_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the payment (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)
